name: UNIX Hard Link
description: The product opens a file without accounting for the possibility that it is a hard link pointing to a file outside the intended control sphere, allowing attackers to create hard links to sensitive files and then operate on them through the link.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or TRANSFORM node provides a filename that may be a hard link to a file outside the intended directory, which flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that checks inode identity, link count, or verifies the file's actual location matches the expected directory
